item.title: Update: we've gone ahead and reset 5-hour and weekly usage limits for everyone, across all plans. Enjoy your weekend!
item.description: Update: we've gone ahead and reset 5-hour and weekly usage limits for everyone, across all plans. Enjoy your weekend!

item.title:
Earlier today, ~3% of Claude Code Max and Pro users hit a bug that showed an incorrect weekly usage limit, and in some cases blocked them from sending messages.
This is fixed, and we're resetting 5-
item.description:
Earlier today, ~3% of Claude Code Max and Pro users hit a bug that showed an incorrect weekly usage limit, and in some cases blocked them from sending messages.
This is fixed, and we're resetting 5-hour and weekly limits for everyone affected. Apologies for the disruption.

item.title:
Artifacts are now live in Claude Code.
Ask Claude to turn what it's working on into a page and send the link to your team. The page updates as the session keeps working.
Available today on Team and
item.description:
Artifacts are now live in Claude Code.
Ask Claude to turn what it's working on into a page and send the link to your team. The page updates as the session keeps working.
Available today on Team and Enterprise plans.

item.title:
We've added support for the Enterprise-Managed Auth extension to MCP.
Admins can centrally authorize MCP connectors for their organization, so all the tools and data users need are connected on thei
item.description:
We've added support for the Enterprise-Managed Auth extension to MCP.
Admins can centrally authorize MCP connectors for their organization, so all the tools and data users need are connected on their first login. https://t.co/NJl57QbxD0

item.title:
Claude Code and Claude Design now sync both ways.
Run /design-sync to pull your design system into your repo and build against your real components, or push what you've built back into Claude Design
item.description:
Claude Code and Claude Design now sync both ways.
Run /design-sync to pull your design system into your repo and build against your real components, or push what you've built back into Claude Design and keep editing on the canvas.

item.title:
Thanks for building with us at Claude Build Day! 300 builders spent their Saturday with us in SF, and we're blown away by what you made in a single day.
Here are all the winning demos: 🧵 https://t.
item.description:
Thanks for building with us at Claude Build Day! 300 builders spent their Saturday with us in SF, and we're blown away by what you made in a single day.
Here are all the winning demos: 🧵 https://t.co/GynahLLweE

item.title:
How do teams get agents into production?
New blog post from our Applied AI team on Claude Managed Agents and the challenges it solves (credentials, sandboxing, observability, & more) ... https://
item.description:
How do teams get agents into production?
New blog post from our Applied AI team on Claude Managed Agents and the challenges it solves (credentials, sandboxing, observability, & more) ... https://t.co/02fp1NMZ6a

item.title: We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users.
item.description: We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users.

item.title:
As a result of a US government directive, we are suspending access to Claude Fable 5 for all users. You can continue to use all other Claude models.
Here’s what this means for you:
Across Claude pro
item.description:
As a result of a US government directive, we are suspending access to Claude Fable 5 for all users. You can continue to use all other Claude models.
Here’s what this means for you:
Across Claude products, new sessions will run on your selected default model or Opus 4.8, and existing Fable 5 sessio

item.title:
Claude Managed Agents can operate in a sandbox you control, on your own infrastructure or with any provider you choose.
Today we added new guides for @blaxelAI, @e2b, @googlecloud, @namespacelabs, an
item.description:
Claude Managed Agents can operate in a sandbox you control, on your own infrastructure or with any provider you choose.
Today we added new guides for @blaxelAI, @e2b, @googlecloud, @namespacelabs, and @superserve_ai, so you can choose the best fit for your use case. https://t.co/7uFMGWUTkp

item.title: /goooooal ⚽ https://t.co/JIHtCRog31
item.description: /goooooal ⚽ https://t.co/JIHtCRog31

item.title:
We've just added two new Claude Managed Agents features:
1. Scheduled deployments - run tasks on a schedule
2. Environment variables - expose vault credentials for CLIs as environment variables htt
item.description:
We've just added two new Claude Managed Agents features:
1. Scheduled deployments - run tasks on a schedule
2. Environment variables - expose vault credentials for CLIs as environment variables https://t.co/exfhz4yylr

item.title:
We’re rolling out changes to make Fable 5’s safeguards for frontier LLM development visible.
Starting this week, flagged requests will visibly fall back to Opus 4.8—the same as our safeguards for cyb
item.description:
We’re rolling out changes to make Fable 5’s safeguards for frontier LLM development visible.
Starting this week, flagged requests will visibly fall back to Opus 4.8—the same as our safeguards for cyber and bio. You will see this every time it happens. On the API, any flagged requests will return a

item.title: New for Apple developers: Foundation Models support for Claude lets developers use Apple's Foundation Models framework to call Claude for multi-step reasoning, code generation, and longer context. htt
item.description: New for Apple developers: Foundation Models support for Claude lets developers use Apple's Foundation Models framework to call Claude for multi-step reasoning, code generation, and longer context. https://t.co/7EbHlWBBSe

item.title: We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users. Enjoy Fable 5!
item.description: We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users. Enjoy Fable 5!

item.title:
We're hosting Claude Fable 5 Build Day in San Francisco on June 13.
Point Fable 5 at a problem worth solving and build a solution with Claude Code.
The Anthropic team will be in the room, with a cha
item.description:
We're hosting Claude Fable 5 Build Day in San Francisco on June 13.
Point Fable 5 at a problem worth solving and build a solution with Claude Code.
The Anthropic team will be in the room, with a chance to win from a prize pool of $150K in Claude credits across 3 finalists. https://t.co/V3Y8yGsjtx

item.title:
Claude Fable 5 is our first generally available Mythos-class model.
It ships with new safety classifiers that may flag certain prompts in dual-use domains like cyber and bio.
We've added fallbacks:
item.description:
Claude Fable 5 is our first generally available Mythos-class model.
It ships with new safety classifiers that may flag certain prompts in dual-use domains like cyber and bio.
We've added fallbacks: a refused request retries on Claude Opus 4.8 instead of dead-ending. https://t.co/iL1Rd6H5pJ

item.title:
If you’re having trouble accessing Claude Fable 5, try running /model claude-fable-5.
In the Claude Code CLI, make sure to upgrade to 2.1.170.
If you’re on the Claude Desktop app, update the latest
item.description:
If you’re having trouble accessing Claude Fable 5, try running /model claude-fable-5.
In the Claude Code CLI, make sure to upgrade to 2.1.170.
If you’re on the Claude Desktop app, update the latest version.

item.title:
Claude Fable 5 changed how we work on the Claude Code team day to day.
We used to verify that Claude did the work right. Now we verify that it's doing the right work.
Here’s the 3 biggest changes: h
item.description:
Claude Fable 5 changed how we work on the Claude Code team day to day.
We used to verify that Claude did the work right. Now we verify that it's doing the right work.
Here’s the 3 biggest changes: https://t.co/KhYNlNWcC4

item.title:
Claude Fable 5 is here. New model generation, new way of working.
Here's how to get started in Claude Code and on the Claude Platform: 🧵
item.description:
Claude Fable 5 is here. New model generation, new way of working.
Here's how to get started in Claude Code and on the Claude Platform: 🧵

item.title:
We've added an observability dashboard for developers of connectors.
Connectors let third-party developers bring their tools and data to Claude via MCP. https://t.co/PSiMHjwFGL
item.description:
We've added an observability dashboard for developers of connectors.
Connectors let third-party developers bring their tools and data to Claude via MCP. https://t.co/PSiMHjwFGL

item.title:
Claude Code's first demo got two Slack reactions.
One year after GA, @bcherny and @_catwu look back: verification best practices, why we built auto mode, routines and loops, and what's next.
https:
item.description:
Claude Code's first demo got two Slack reactions.
One year after GA, @bcherny and @_catwu look back: verification best practices, why we built auto mode, routines and loops, and what's next.
https://t.co/yEa3cmCrg4

item.title:
How do we automate business analytics with Claude?
New blog post covering our best practices for skills, data foundations, and evaluations when building agents to perform data analysis:
https://t.c
item.description:
How do we automate business analytics with Claude?
New blog post covering our best practices for skills, data foundations, and evaluations when building agents to perform data analysis:
https://t.co/mfEJMAQFBU

item.title:
We've changed the trigger word from "workflow" to "ultracode".
You can still say "use a workflow for this", but when you're clearly referring to something else, Claude won't kick off a dynamic workfl
item.description:
We've changed the trigger word from "workflow" to "ultracode".
You can still say "use a workflow for this", but when you're clearly referring to something else, Claude won't kick off a dynamic workflow. For an explicit trigger, use "ultracode". We appreciate the feedback!

item.title:
We've updated /fork in Claude Code
/fork now runs a background agent with your exact context (system prompt, tools, history, model) and prompt cache. The result gets returned to your session.
/branc
item.description:
We've updated /fork in Claude Code
/fork now runs a background agent with your exact context (system prompt, tools, history, model) and prompt cache. The result gets returned to your session.
/branch (the old /fork) still copies the transcript to a new session you drive. https://t.co/eMyFrk8PfR

item.title:
RT @trq212: Workflows are the biggest upgrade to Claude Code’s capabilities since skills and subagents.
I dove deep into it with @sidbid t…
item.description:
RT @trq212: Workflows are the biggest upgrade to Claude Code’s capabilities since skills and subagents.
I dove deep into it with @sidbid t…

item.title:
How do you get Claude Code to check its own work before handing it back?
Watch how you can encode your manual checks so Claude closes its own feedback loop: https://t.co/gxastVL4QH
item.description:
How do you get Claude Code to check its own work before handing it back?
Watch how you can encode your manual checks so Claude closes its own feedback loop: https://t.co/gxastVL4QH

item.title:
We’ve added a CLI for Claude Platform to make every API endpoint runnable from your terminal.
Call the Messages API, stand up Claude Managed Agents, pipe results straight into your shell.
The ant CL
item.description:
We’ve added a CLI for Claude Platform to make every API endpoint runnable from your terminal.
Call the Messages API, stand up Claude Managed Agents, pipe results straight into your shell.
The ant CLI is well understood by coding agents (Claude Code) using the claude-api skill. https://t.co/t2ruhuA

item.title:
We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users on Pro and Max plans.
We fixed an issue that caused some Claude Code sessions to spawn excessive parallel subagents, burning through usage fast
item.description:
We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users on Pro and Max plans.
We fixed an issue that caused some Claude Code sessions to spawn excessive parallel subagents, burning through usage faster than expected.

item.title:
With Opus 4.8, you can add system instructions mid-conversation without breaking the prompt cache.
More cache hits means lower cost and latency for your API requests. https://t.co/42C7wqnLhD
item.description:
With Opus 4.8, you can add system instructions mid-conversation without breaking the prompt cache.
More cache hits means lower cost and latency for your API requests. https://t.co/42C7wqnLhD

item.title:
New in Claude Code (research preview): dynamic workflows.
Claude writes an orchestration script on the fly, then spins up a large fleet of coordinated subagents in parallel to take on your most compl
item.description:
New in Claude Code (research preview): dynamic workflows.
Claude writes an orchestration script on the fly, then spins up a large fleet of coordinated subagents in parallel to take on your most complex tasks.
Use the word "workflow" in a prompt to get started. https://t.co/re4SG3AyDm

item.title:
Opus 4.8 is live in Claude Code today.
A few things worth knowing: 🧵
item.description:
Opus 4.8 is live in Claude Code today.
A few things worth knowing: 🧵

item.title:
We’ve been putting a lot of effort into making Claude Code more responsive & reliable.
Here’s an update on everything we’ve done:
item.description:
We’ve been putting a lot of effort into making Claude Code more responsive & reliable.
Here’s an update on everything we’ve done:

item.title:
We’ve shipped a security-guidance plugin for Claude Code that helps identify and fix vulnerabilities as you’re writing code.
Available for all Claude Code users. Install from the plugin marketplace (
item.description:
We’ve shipped a security-guidance plugin for Claude Code that helps identify and fix vulnerabilities as you’re writing code.
Available for all Claude Code users. Install from the plugin marketplace (/plugins). https://t.co/LprgC4m6Kf

item.title:
Two updates to auto mode:
· Now available on the Pro plan · Sonnet 4.6 is now supported, alongside Opus 4.7
Shift+tab, and let Claude run.
item.description:
Two updates to auto mode:
· Now available on the Pro plan · Sonnet 4.6 is now supported, alongside Opus 4.7
Shift+tab, and let Claude run.

item.title:
RT @nottombrown: We’re expanding our partnership with @SpaceX, and will be scaling up on GB200 capacity in Colossus 2 throughout June.
Ap…
item.description:
RT @nottombrown: We’re expanding our partnership with @SpaceX, and will be scaling up on GB200 capacity in Colossus 2 throughout June.
Ap…

item.title:
Computer use turns Claude into an agent that can operate real UIs.
New blog post on making it reliable in production: getting click accuracy right, choosing thinking effort levels, keeping long sess
item.description:
Computer use turns Claude into an agent that can operate real UIs.
New blog post on making it reliable in production: getting click accuracy right, choosing thinking effort levels, keeping long sessions within context, and recording demonstrations Claude can replay:
https://t.co/JwSI3YDWcK

item.title: Welcome to the team, Andrej!
item.description: Welcome to the team, Andrej!

item.title:
We’ve added two security improvements to Claude Managed Agents.
Self-hosted sandboxes keep the agent’s execution environment in your infrastructure or with a managed sandbox provider.
MCP tunnels l
item.description:
We’ve added two security improvements to Claude Managed Agents.
Self-hosted sandboxes keep the agent’s execution environment in your infrastructure or with a managed sandbox provider.
MCP tunnels let the agent connect to services inside your security perimeter. https://t.co/h7kvlTdNda

item.title: So good to see you, London!🇬🇧
item.description: So good to see you, London!🇬🇧

item.title:
We've renamed "extra usage" to "usage credits" across Claude.
Your spending limits, auto-reload settings, and any credits you've already bought carry over exactly as they were.
item.description:
We've renamed "extra usage" to "usage credits" across Claude.
Your spending limits, auto-reload settings, and any credits you've already bought carry over exactly as they were.

item.title:
Fast mode now defaults to Opus 4.7 in Claude Code.
Try it out today with /fast https://t.co/i0roMdEgEg
item.description:
Fast mode now defaults to Opus 4.7 in Claude Code.
Try it out today with /fast https://t.co/i0roMdEgEg

item.title:
Prompt cache diagnostics are now in Claude Console.
When a request misses the cache, you can now see exactly which part of your prompt changed and how many tokens it cost you. https://t.co/z0dV6zzLPm
item.description:
Prompt cache diagnostics are now in Claude Console.
When a request misses the cache, you can now see exactly which part of your prompt changed and how many tokens it cost you. https://t.co/z0dV6zzLPm

item.title:
What are best practices for running Claude Code at scale?
New blog post on what we've learned from teams running it across multi-million-line monorepos, decades-old legacy systems, and distributed mi
item.description:
What are best practices for running Claude Code at scale?
New blog post on what we've learned from teams running it across multi-million-line monorepos, decades-old legacy systems, and distributed microservices:
https://t.co/rJUYlIUiTT

item.title: Happy Friday! We've reset everyone's 5-hour and weekly rate limits.
item.description: Happy Friday! We've reset everyone's 5-hour and weekly rate limits.

item.title:
Useful tip to cut time-to-first-token on longer prompts in the API: pre-warm the prompt cache.
Send your system prompt before the user prompt. Claude writes it to the cache, but skips generating any
item.description:
Useful tip to cut time-to-first-token on longer prompts in the API: pre-warm the prompt cache.
Send your system prompt before the user prompt. Claude writes it to the cache, but skips generating any output.
When the real user request lands, it'll hit a warm cache. https://t.co/6BdEzbamr2

item.title:
Claude Code weekly limits are increasing 50%, now through July 13.
Live now for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users. https://t.co/5nU0XX4RZY
item.description:
Claude Code weekly limits are increasing 50%, now through July 13.
Live now for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users. https://t.co/5nU0XX4RZY

item.title:
Starting June 15, paid Claude plans can claim a dedicated monthly credit for programmatic usage.
The credit covers usage of: - Claude Agent SDK - claude -p - Claude Code GitHub Actions - Third-party
item.description:
Starting June 15, paid Claude plans can claim a dedicated monthly credit for programmatic usage.
The credit covers usage of: - Claude Agent SDK - claude -p - Claude Code GitHub Actions - Third-party apps built on the Agent SDK

item.title: How do you keep Claude working until the job is done? Claude Code helps with this in a few ways, including one we shipped recently: /goal. https://t.co/QtVPmwoKct
item.description: How do you keep Claude working until the job is done? Claude Code helps with this in a few ways, including one we shipped recently: /goal. https://t.co/QtVPmwoKct

item.title: Fast mode for Claude Opus 4.7 is now available in research preview on the API and in Claude Code.
item.description: Fast mode for Claude Opus 4.7 is now available in research preview on the API and in Claude Code.
